description: This file defines the BaseComponent class for Bootstrap, providing core functionality for UI components, including configuration management, event handling, and instance management.

classes.name: BaseComponent
classes.description: A base class for Bootstrap components that manages configuration, data association, and event handling.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Removes data and event handlers associated with the component instance, and nullifies its properties.

methods.name: _queueCallback
methods.description: Executes a callback after a transition, optionally animated.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Merges and validates the configuration object.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves an existing instance or creates a new one for a DOM element.
